_doc: Curated coherent web-browser fingerprints used by igFetch for cookie-uploaded IG sessions. Each entry is a complete, internally-consistent set: the User-Agent, sec-ch-ua hints, sec-ch-ua-platform, sec-ch-ua-mobile, and accept-language all match a real browser/OS pairing. Mixing values across entries (e.g. Mac UA with Windows sec-ch-ua-platform) is itself a detection signal. Sources: real Chrome/Edge/Firefox/Safari builds released within the last ~6 months. Update every ~90 days.
